title: 夜食 Yashoku
description: Late nights, bright lights, and the best food you'll ever eat standing up. A guide to Japan's nocturnal street food scene.

author.name: Hiroshi Nakamura
author.bio: Food writer and late-night eater based between Tokyo and Osaka. I write about Japan's nocturnal street food culture — the izakayas, yatai, ramen carts, and standing bars that only make sense after dark.
